summary: Solid test suite with comprehensive coverage of core requirements: secret classification (expired/warning/ok), both output formats (JSON/markdown), validation logic, CLI integration, and workflow structure validation. Demonstrates TDD methodology with clear test classes and good separation of concerns. Boundary conditions tested (exactly on expiry, exactly on warning window). Error cases covered (missing fields, invalid dates, invalid JSON). Strengths: well-organized classes, explicit test names, fixture-based testing, act harness validates workflow execution. Weaknesses: some edge cases untested (special characters, malformed required_by, very large datasets); act integration uses fragile regex extraction from logs; no performance/scale tests; no tests for concurrent access or encoding edge cases. Fixture files referenced but contents not shown (expected per task structure). The separate run_tests.py harness correctly implements the required act-based validation loop with output parsing and assertion on exact expected values. Would catch most regressions in core logic; minor gaps in edge case and error message rigor.
